commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=b847afe4ee1c5852e5543e393f2e4a79b4a17e34)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes WebChat `/stop` handling and Gateway `chat.abort`/`chat.send` abort resolution so selected or inferred hidden channel sessions, including WeChat sessions, can be aborted.

PR surface: Source +232, Tests +418. Total +650 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main filters hidden active and pending runs before runId-less session-key abort matching, while WebChat can send runId-less aborts. I did not run a live WebChat/WeChat reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human maintainer review is needed for the broad hidden-channel Stop policy, proof interpretation, and coordination with the broader open Stop recovery PR.

target.title: fix: WebChat stop fails for WeChat channel sessions
target.body:
Related: #91987

## What Problem This Solves

Fixes WebChat `/stop` failing to stop looping channel-originated agent turns, observed with a WeChat channel session selected in WebChat.

## Why This Change Was Made

WebChat exact stop text now bypasses slash-menu selection and is submitted as the typed command, so `/stop` reliably reaches the abort path.

The gateway side now covers all active state used by this flow:

- `chatAbortControllers` for normal WebChat/chat runs
- hidden explicit channel session fallbacks for registered or pre-registered channel runs
- `replyRunRegistry` for active channel auto-reply operations that do not have a chat abort controller

The registry fallback is limited to admin-scoped `chat.abort` calls and explicit requested session keys, so broad non-admin aborts do not gain new cross-session cancellation power.

## User Impact

Users viewing a WeChat/channel session in WebChat can stop a looping channel agent with `/stop`. Broad visible sessions still do not accidentally stop unrelated hidden channel work.

## Evidence

Video proof:

- Before fix: 

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1107f4e1-8450-4f2b-981a-ac5815673ed2



- After fix: 

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/25f32135-1f1a-4f9c-b0a7-ddade5464b86



Automated/local proof:

- Manual local proof: rebuilt gateway/Control UI, restarted local gateway, reproduced WeChat channel loop, and confirmed WebChat `/stop` stopped the running turn.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.abort-persistence.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/gateway/server-methods/chat.ts src/gateway/server-methods/chat.abort-persistence.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.ts ui/src/ui/app-chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm tsgo:core`
- `pnpm build`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`
